summary:
WEEKLY REVIEW — 2026-06-20

ISSUES FOUND
- UFC dashboard (ufc-dashboard#14): Silent extraction failure. Events `ufc-fight-night-281` and `medic-vs-rodriguez` carry fingerprint e3b0c442...b7852b855 — the SHA-256 of an EMPTY string. The scraper fetched nothing yet marks them is_stale=false and counts them in the 100% success rate. Dashboard shows them green while they hold no data. Fix: detect empty/below-minimum payloads, flag them, and exclude from success_rate. (No duplicate existed.)

IDLE / MONITORING GAPS
- Volleyball CV: read OK but ALL ZEROS (0 frames, 0 footage, last_footage_at=null, no errors). This is IDLE, not healthy — we can't tell if the pipeline ran with no new footage or didn't run at all. Treating as a monitoring gap (see enhancement volleyball#6).

STATUS SUMMARY
- Crypto bot: ACTIVE/healthy. 7d: 2 trades, +$14.01, 6 signals, last fill 06-17, no errors. (win_rate 1.0 is only 2 trades — noise.)
- UFC scraper: 50 runs/7d, 100% success, 0 stale by time-threshold — but see #14, the success metric is masking 2 empty events.
- Volleyball: IDLE (above).
- Overseer (self): 3 runs/7d, 100% success, no errors — but self-review flagged real gaps: it passed an idle project as "ok" and exposes no run-freshness, so a skipped weekly run would look identical to a healthy one.

ENHANCEMENT IDEAS (1+ per project)
- crypto-trading#20 [low/med]: Report a 30d/90d window beside 7d and grey-out win_rate when trades<10; emit signals_acted vs signals_evaluated. Stops 1-2 trade weeks reading as "flawless."
- volleyball#6 [low/high]: Emit last_run_at (heartbeat) separate from last_footage_at + days_since_last_footage so idleness is detectable instead of silently passing.
- ufc-dashboard#15 [med/med]: Persist parsed odds snapshots and compute line-movement deltas (open vs current, run-over-run) — turns the scraper into an actual odds tracker, its stated purpose.
- overseer#5 [low/high]: Add shared IDLE classification (zero counters + null last-activity = IDLE, surfaced explicitly), add run-freshness/age to self-status to catch blind/skipped runs, and add regression tests for status-JSON edge cases (empty fingerprint, null timestamps, missing fields).

Volleyball.reason: read OK but no recent activity / stale data
